Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM (LTM: L1/L2 Triggered Mobility).
Feature_Objectives: To enable the gNB-CU to prepare and send an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to a candidate gNB-DU for LTM configuration.

To enable the candidate gNB-DU to respond with an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message, indicating acceptance and providing generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: 1. The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration based on L3 measurement reports from the UE.
2. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell.

3. The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message contains: one candidate cell ID, and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may also provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).
4. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.
5. The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message includes the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 1. The gNB-CU sends an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell to create a UE context and setup one or more data bearers for LTM.

2. The 'UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST' message includes a candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. It may also include the LTM configuration ID mapping list, a request for PRACH resources, or a request/provision of lower layer configuration for reference generation.
3. The candidate gNB-DU processes the request and, if accepted, responds to the gNB-CU with an F1AP 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message.
4. The 'UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE' message includes the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
